creator: vsilyaev@mindspring.com
text:
Sorry this line should be excluded from path:
--- apache13.bak/files/1        Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
+++ apache13/files/1    Thu Oct 19 14:50:44 2000
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
Or in another words "files/1" file should be ignored.

Vladimir

On Sun, Oct 22, 2000 at 02:30:40PM -0400, James E. Housley wrote:
> This patch creates a file "files/1".  What is it's purpose?  It won't be
> committed as a patch.
